prompt_text:
### Demographics: 77-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 16 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Cirrhosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Cirrhosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.6 kg; Height 155.6 cm; BMI 20.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 215mg/dL; 9 months ago 207mg/dL; 6 months ago 193mg/dL; 3 months ago 174mg/dL; current 146mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 50.3kg; 9 months ago 48.8kg; 6 months ago 46.9kg; 3 months ago 46.7kg; current 50.6kg), Height (12 months ago 155.6cm; 9 months ago 155.6cm; 6 months ago 155.6cm; 3 months ago 155.6cm; current 155.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 82U/L; 9 months ago 89U/L; 6 months ago 83U/L; 3 months ago 90U/L; current 88U/L), AST (12 months ago 121U/L; 9 months ago 121U/L; 6 months ago 118U/L; 3 months ago 112U/L; current 119U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 2.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 2.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 2.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 2.4mg/dL; current 2.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; current 55mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 97mg/g; 9 months ago 90mg/g; 6 months ago 118mg/g; 3 months ago 85mg/g; current 87mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 59mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 116mg/dL; 9 months ago 131mg/dL; 6 months ago 132mg/dL; 3 months ago 114mg/dL; current 122mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.8g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.02 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
